case_title: ROSSEN RAYKOV VS. BARBIZON MODELING AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAYKOV, ROSSEN AS TO DEFENDANT BARBIZON MODELING AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BARBIZON MODELING AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY RAYKOV, ROSSEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAYKOV, ROSSEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBIZON MODELING AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. $3,290.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
